name: Pacific Current Group Limited
analysis: PAC has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 0% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$11.2000. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$11.6300, stop A$10.3257, target A$15.5429 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
